title: Cog Crosshair
description: Spice up your hud with a gear crosshair
body:
Customize your gameplay with a redesigned crosshair! This texture pack replaces the vanilla crosshair with a gear crosshair. Enjoy the subtle yet fun tweak to your hud! 

View all custom crosshairs [here](https://modrinth.com/collection/j7n3r29O)

This pack is compatible with versions 1.21.1 to 1.21.11.
